name: theoretical-computer-science-prerequisites-book
description: 理論計算機科学教科書へ進むための数学・証明・アルゴリズム前提教材
author: ITDO Inc.（株式会社アイティードゥ）

scripts.dev: bundle exec jekyll serve --livereload --source docs --config docs/_config.yml --destination _site
scripts.build: bundle exec jekyll build --source docs --config docs/_config.yml --destination _site
scripts.test: python scripts/check_links.py && python scripts/check_progression_policy.py && python scripts/check_exercise_labels.py && python scripts/check_exercise_solution_mapping.py && python examples/python/tests.py && python -m pytest
